scripts.build: bun build --compile index.ts --outfile out/adapter && rm -rf proto && cp -R ../criteria-typescript-adapter-sdk/proto .
scripts.build:linux-x64: bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 index.ts --outfile out/adapter-linux-amd64 && rm -rf proto && cp -R ../criteria-typescript-adapter-sdk/proto .
scripts.build:linux-arm64: bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 index.ts --outfile out/adapter-linux-arm64 && rm -rf proto && cp -R ../criteria-typescript-adapter-sdk/proto .
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 index.ts --outfile out/adapter-darwin-arm64 && rm -rf proto && cp -R ../criteria-typescript-adapter-sdk/proto .
